introSection:
Big Dipper was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Chippewa Lake Park in Chippewa Lake, Ohio, USA.

After the ride's closure, it remained standing but not operating through 2010.
fullText:
Big Dipper was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Chippewa Lake Park in Chippewa Lake, Ohio, USA.

After the ride's closure, it remained standing but not operating through 2010.
